message:
fix(storage): replace INSERT OR REPLACE with DELETE+INSERT for fsqlite

frankensqlite does not reliably enforce UNIQUE/PRIMARY KEY for
INSERT OR REPLACE. Replace all 6 occurrences in sqlite.rs with
explicit DELETE + INSERT patterns:

- export_hashes: fixes sync --flush-only UNIQUE constraint (#202)
- blocked_issues_cache: fixes close/update UNIQUE constraint (#199)
- dirty_issues: batch DELETE before INSERT
- child_counters: DELETE before INSERT in rebuild and update paths

Closes #199
Closes #202

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
